Minimum suggested crew size:
1. For membrane waterproofing on slabs: one skilled leader, four skilled laborers, and two unskilled
laborers.
2. For membrane waterproofing with fiberglass fabric and other work elements: one skilled laborer and
one unskilled laborer.
3. For cementitious waterproofing sprayed on application: one skilled laborer and two unskilled laborers.
